fields.description:
## Why
The model emits no holistic severity/confidence anywhere in the decision path; the decision is deterministic
code.

## What
- Cited-reference veto (ONLY when a code citation is present) -> graded-fraction confidence -> severity from
  attributes -> decision block | advisory | dropped, against per-criterion block_threshold.

- Pass-3's SURVIVING (advisory, not-dropped) findings feed the Pass-4 affirmative coach `75a9` (crusty-herb-stand), which primes the caller with a next move per finding and NEVER alters this pass's decision.
## Scope
- Pure code (no LLM). Defaults advisory-only in v1 (only the DET floor blocks); per-criterion blocking is
  opt-in; thresholds project-overridable and start high.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Deterministic veto -> confidence -> severity -> decision; no model holistic severity/confidence in the path.
- [ ] Advisory-only default; per-criterion blocking opt-in; thresholds configurable.
- [ ] Unit-tested aggregation (veto, confidence, severity buckets, decision).
